title: Google shipped three cheap Gemini models and a Mythos rival, but not the one that matters
summary: Google claims Flash Cyber matches frontier performance on a key benchmark at a fraction of the price, a direct swipe at Anthropic’s lead in AI-driven security . Google is also building a custom chip to serve Gemini far more cheaply.
